mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.activity_name as activityName, a.activity_type as activityType, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.description, a.start_time as startTime, a.end_time as endTime, a.max_participants as maxParticipants, a.current_participants as currentParticipants, a.points_reward as pointsReward, a.status, a.create_time as createTime, a.creator_id as creatorId, a.creator_name as creatorName, CASE a.activity_type WHEN 1 THEN '培训讲座' WHEN 2 THEN '知识竞赛' WHEN 3 THEN '演练活动' WHEN 4 THEN '宣传活动' ELSE '其他活动' END as activityTypeName, CASE a.status WHEN 0 THEN '筹备中' WHEN 1 THEN '报名中' WHEN 2 THEN '进行中' WHEN 3 THEN '已结束' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END as statusName, CASE WHEN ar.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isRegistered, CASE WHEN ar2.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isSignedIn, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_feedback af WHERE af.activity_id = a.id AND af.deleted = 0) as feedbackCount FROM activity a LEFT JOIN activity_registration ar ON a.id = ar.activity_id AND ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN activity_sign_in ar2 ON a.id = ar2.activity_id AND ar2.user_id = #{userId} AND ar2.deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT ar.id, ar.user_id as userId, u.real_name as userName, u.avatar, u.department, ar.register_time as registerTime, CASE ar.status WHEN 0 THEN '已报名' WHEN 1 THEN '已签到' WHEN 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN 3 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END as statusName FROM activity_registration ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ar.activity_id = #{activityId} AND ar.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ar.register_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.activity_name as activityName, a.activity_type as activityType, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.start_time as startTime, a.end_time as endTime, a.max_participants as maxParticipants, a.current_participants as currentParticipants, a.points_reward as pointsReward, a.status, CASE a.activity_type WHEN 1 THEN '培训讲座' WHEN 2 THEN '知识竞赛' WHEN 3 THEN '演练活动' WHEN 4 THEN '宣传活动' ELSE '其他活动' END as activityTypeName FROM activity a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY a.start_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
